metadata.author: LivingPatch Contributors
metadata.description: Example pack demonstrating how to add new symbiosis relationships linking existing species without redefining them

symbiosis.notes: American Kestrel occasionally hunts Monarch butterflies, though they are toxic and avoided when better prey available.
Long-tongued bumble bee workers can reach nectar deep in columbine flower spurs. Short-tongued bees rob nectar through spur holes.
